On a scale from 1 to 10, your inequity aversion level is: 3. 10 means you strongly prioritize fairness between players, and 1 means you don't care.
column37: Voted rules — may a player be punished for contributing... LESS than the group average: YES; exactly the group average: NO; MORE than the group average: NO
